description: Summary Engine emits 64 B per KV chunk. Layout is packed and namespace-sealed.

fields.name: key_centroid[32]
fields.purpose: input to c_sem dot product with query sketch

fields.name: key_norm
fields.encoding: log2 of key L2-norm, quantised to [0,255]
fields.purpose: allows scorer to scale c_sem by key magnitude

fields.name: value_norm
fields.encoding: log2 of value L2-norm, quantised to [0,255]
fields.purpose: feeds c_press via output activation magnitude

fields.name: write_version
fields.encoding: monotonically increasing 64-bit counter, bumped on every WriteSketch
